svg.text: Raspberry Pi GPIO ↔ Commodore 64 Ultimate / Ultimate 64 Elite II (P5 JTAG)
Pin assignments match xc3sprog matrix_creator / gpiod_creator / LinuxJedi 2025 Pi-JTAG layout
P1 — pin 1 marked ▼ ; viewed from above
Each used Pi pin connects to exactly one C64U P5 pin via a single jumper wire — no level-shifter, no ground loop.

g.text: Pi pin 1 / 17 (3V3) ✗ P5 pin 4 (3V3) — back-feeds the C64U from the Pi's 3.3V rail and can damage the board.
